---
title: "NEGBINOMIAL"
generated: true
description: "The negative-binomial family at dispersion ``1.0`` (log link) -- a default for overdispersed counts; build others with ``negbinomial(theta)``."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.stats.glm`](../nitrix-stats-glm.qmd)

*Re-exported here; defined in `nitrix.stats._family`.*

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:NEGBINOMIAL -->
```python
NEGBINOMIAL = negbinomial(1.0)
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:NEGBINOMIAL -->
The negative-binomial family at dispersion `1.0` (log link) -- a default for overdispersed counts; build others with `negbinomial(theta)`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
